properties.event_title: Washintgton, DC: White House correspondents’ dinner incident
properties.summary: Reported security incident at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner. No casualties reported.

properties.event_title: Austin, Texas: Mass shooting at Buford's on West 6th Street
properties.summary: Mass shooting in Austin resulting in multiple fatalities and injuries. Suspect was shot by police at the scene.

properties.event_title: Boulder City, Nevada: Power Substation Event
properties.summary: On February 19, 2026, a driver rammed a vehicle through the gate of a power substation in Boulder City, Nevada, in an incident being investigated as possible terrorism, and was later found dead from a self-inflicted gunshot wound. Authorities identified him as 23-year-old Dawson Maloney and reported finding extremist-related materials and explosive components in his possession.

properties.event_title: Michigan, West Bloomfield: Temple Israel Vehicle Ramming
properties.summary: On March 12, 2026, the Department of Homeland Security identified 41-year-old Ayman Mohamad Ghazali as the suspect in an attack at Temple Israel in West Bloomfield Township, Michigan. The FBI is treating the incident as a targeted act of violence against the Jewish community, and no other serious casualties were reported.
March 8, 2026, an attempted bomb attack during a protest outside Mayor Zohran Mamdani's official residence investigated by the NYPD and the FBI as "act of ISIS-inspired terrorism."

properties.event_title: Minneapolis, Minnesota: Jake Lang anti-Somali Protest
properties.summary: January 17 2026 anti-Somali protest in Minneapolis organized by Jake Lang was “vastly” outnumbered by counter protesters who successfully blocked a planned Quran burning.

properties.event_title: Washington, DC: Patriot Front Anti-Abortion March
properties.summary: January 24 2026, roughly 100 members of the Patriot Front, a white nationalist group, including its leader Thomas Rousseau, paraded along the National Mall in an anti-abortion rally carrying flags and banners while Vice President J.D. Vance spoke.

properties.event_title: Missoula, Montana: Man turns himself in after planning to kill abortion doctor
properties.summary: March 8 2026 Charles Felix Jones, turned himself in to the police after entering the property of an abortion doctor with a loaded weapon, only to change their mind and turn away. Jones is believed to have been invovled in other anti-abortion activities and attacks.

properties.event_title: Norfolk, Virginia: Old Dominion University shooting
properties.summary: On March 12, 2026, a former Army National Guard member who had spent eight years in prison for attempting to aid the Islamic State opened fire on a classroom at Virginia's Old Dominion University
